response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct experience with C++ development on Windows (mandatory skill) or SQL Server/Oracle (mandatory skill). While they have C/C++ experience from National Instruments, it's not recent or focused on Windows platforms, and there is no evidence of fixed-income or capital markets domain knowledge. The resume heavily emphasizes modern web and scripting stacks, which do not align with the core requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple technologies
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Demonstrated ability to work in fast-paced, high-performance environments
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory)
No domain expertise in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking (mandatory)
